description_long: This chaise features a rectangular, generously padded seat with a smooth, unadorned surface, supported by four slender, angled legs. The upholstery appears to be a solid, light gray material, likely synthetic leather or fabric, with no visible seams, tufting, or decorative elements. The legs are black, metal, and splayed outward for stability, giving the piece a modern, minimalist aesthetic. The chaise lacks both a backrest and armrests, emphasizing its streamlined, functional design. The underside reveals a simple frame construction, with no storage or mechanical components visible. Its overall appearance suggests comfort and durability, suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or public seating areas.
description: A modern, rectangular chaise with smooth light gray upholstery and four black, angled metal legs, lacking backrest and armrests for a minimalist look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat, rectangular seat and two splayed black legs, with no visible backrest or armrests.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the chaise's low profile, the thickness of the seat cushion, and the outward angle of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the flat back edge and two rear legs, with no additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the same low, rectangular seat and angled legs, confirming the absence of side or back supports.
attribute_backrest_design: There is no backrest present on this chaise; the seat is flat and extends the full length without any raised or segmented support.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, slender, and angled outward, constructed from black metal with a smooth, matte finish and no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid light gray with a smooth, untextured surface and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, large, attached cushion forming the seat, with no additional or loose cushions visible.
